# ZCraft Studios

ZCraft Studios is a premium developer studio crafting Minecraft resources, plugins, server configs, Discord bots, and modern web experiences.

Canonical site: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/
AI JSON endpoint: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/ai-agents
Full generated site index JSON: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/site-index.json
Compact AI overview JSON: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/ai-overview.json
Plain-text AI overview: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/ai.txt
XML sitemap: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/sitemap.xml

## Primary Pages

- Home: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/
- About: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/about
- Team: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/team
- Resources: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/resources
- AI JSON endpoint: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/ai-agents
- Request custom work: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/request
- Contact: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/contact
- Donate: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/donate

## Live Source Data

- Site config: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/config/info.json
- Products and resources: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/config/products.json
- Reviews: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/config/reviews.json

## Summary For AI Agents

Use https://studio.z-craft.xyz/site-index.json for the fullest structured overview. It is generated from the live config and product data during build. Use https://studio.z-craft.xyz/ai-overview.json for a compact summary, or https://studio.z-craft.xyz/ai.txt when plain text is preferred.
